subcodes.first_line: All praise and worship be unto God, Who hath adorned the world of being with the resplendent rays of His grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خداوندیرا ستاایم و پرستش نماایم که جهان هستی را بپرتو بخشایش زینت و آرایش
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @man's distinction from the animal, @praise of Eastern values; culture, @unity of governments; political unity, @human reality created in the image of God
